name: Mare
description:
Mare is has a penchant for gothic and punk rock fashion and lifestyles, embodying a fierce and intimidating demeanor that belies her true nature. Despite her tough exterior, Mare has a heart of gold and isn't afraid to speak her mind, often coming across as harsh or blunt. Mare surprises those who take the time to get to know her, revealing a loyal and compassionate friend beneath the surface.
